post.description:
|
            Mock-only endpoint for integration testing and development.
            Simulates creating a delivery request — mimics a real provider flow
            where KitchenHub initiates a delivery with a provider.

            Supports two modes:
            - **Custom delivery**: provide `delivery_data` with full delivery details.
            - **Template delivery**: provide `store_id`, `order_id` and `delivery_provider_id`
              — KitchenHub will generate the delivery from a template.

            The `delivery_order_id` from the response is used to simulate
            status updates via `PUT /v2/mock/deliveries/{delivery_order_id}/status/`.

424.description: Error on provider side. Please try again later

500.description: Technical error. Please contact support to resolve this issue

501.description: Provider is not supported or not implemented yet

put.summary: Simulate a delivery status update (mock only)
put.description:
|
            Mock-only endpoint for integration testing and development.
            Simulates a status update from a delivery provider — mimics a real provider flow.

            Use `delivery_order_id` from the response of `POST /v2/mock/deliveries/` —
            this is the same ID the delivery provider uses to reference the delivery
            when sending status updates.

days.description: Days when the service is closed. If day not specified, service will be closed for all days.List of days should be always fresh. Closing days which are not in the list but are in account will be removed.

price.title: Price

shared_library__kh_core_models__menu__me.title: CustomPriceSchema
shared_library__kh_core_models__menu__me.description:
Customization price information for providers. Can be extended by new fields.
Free items allowed. Applicable for item options.

price.title: Price
price.description: The cost of the item including discounts, delivery etc. Required Field. Should be positive num. 0 is allowed

original_price.title: Original item price
original_price.description: The cost of the item for pickup. This price does not include delivery charges. This field should be a positive number. Used only by doordash provider.

pos_id.title: POS item id
pos_id.description: Item id from your POS system

partner_id.title: Partner item id
partner_id.description: Partner item id

name.title: Name
name.description: The display name of the menu item

is_deactivated.title: Is deactivated
is_deactivated.description:
Boolean field which show if item is deactivated.
            Client can also specify the time when item is deactivated

deactivation_start_date.title: Deactivation start date
deactivation_start_date.description: Date since item is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

deactivation_end_date.title: Deactivation end date
deactivation_end_date.description: Date till item is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

media_url.title: Media url
media_url.description:
The URL where the image file can be downloaded.
            The image you have selected will be transformed to fit provider requirements
            (we recommend to keep at least 1024 px each side). If provider expects specific aspect-ratio,
            white borders can be added to fit this requirement.

price.title: Price
price.description: The cost of this item. This field should be a positive number.

original_price.title: Original item price
original_price.description: The cost of the item for pickup. This price does not include delivery charges. This field should be a positive number.

prices_customization.title: Prices Customization
prices_customization.description: Custom price information for selected providers. Contains mapping of provider_id to prices. This field can be skipped, but cannot contain a null value.

min_amount.title: Min amount
min_amount.description: Default minimum quantity that can be ordered of this item. Default value - 1

max_amount.title: Max amount
max_amount.description: Default maximum quantity that can be ordered of this item. Default value - 3

partner_availability.title: Partner availability
partner_availability.description: Partner ID of availability, which is connected with this item (opening hours of the restaurant)

partner_modifiers.title: Partner modifiers
partner_modifiers.description:
All of the partner IDs for the menu modifiers that belongs to this item.
            Modifiers will be displayed in UI in the same order they are listed here.

tax_rate.title: Tax rate
tax_rate.description: Extra tax which may be added to some items on top of regular sales tax. Must be between 0 and 1.

tax_category.title: Tax category
tax_category.description: Tax category that an item belongs to (only for Canada). It's ignored if is_alcohol is True

is_alcohol.title: Is alcohol
is_alcohol.description: Flag indicates that item contain alcohol

pos_id.title: POS modifier id
pos_id.description: Modifier id from your POS system

partner_id.title: Partner modifier id
partner_id.description: Partner modifier id. Filled in manually

name.title: Name
name.description: The displayed name for the modifier or size

is_required.title: Is required
is_required.description: A boolean field that indicates that the modifier is required or not

min_options.title: Min options
min_options.description: Min number of options which customer select.

max_options.title: Max options
max_options.description: Max number of options which customer select.

default_options.title: Default options
default_options.description: The options ids, if any, that are selected by default for this modifier

partner_options.title: Partner options
partner_options.description:
All of the partner IDs for the menu options that belongs to this modifier.
            Options will be displayed in UI in the same order they are listed here.

type.title: Modifier type
type.description:
The type of modifier it can be size or variation.
        Min and max options will be ignored if modifier type is 'size'.

free_options_quantity.title: Free Options Quantity
free_options_quantity.description: Indicates how many options are free when this modifier is selected when this modifier is selected

min_options_quantity.title: Min Options Quantity
min_options_quantity.description: Indicates the minimum number of options quantity that must be selected when this modifier is selected

max_options_quantity.title: Max Options Quantity
max_options_quantity.description: Indicates the maximum number of options quantity that can be selected when this modifier is selected

pos_id.title: POS option id
pos_id.description: Option id from your POS system

partner_id.title: Partner option id
partner_id.description: Partner option id.

name.title: Name
name.description: The displayed name for the option or size

original_price.title: The cost of the item for pickup. This price does not include delivery charges. This field should be a positive number.

prices_customization.title: Prices Customization
prices_customization.description: Custom price information for selected providers. Contains mapping of provider_id to prices. This field can be skipped, but cannot contain a null value.

tax_rate.title: Tax rate
tax_rate.description: Extra tax which may be added to some options on top of regular sales tax.. Must be between 0 and 1.

tax_category.title: Tax category
tax_category.description: Tax category that an option belongs to (only for Canada)

is_deactivated.title: Is deactivated
is_deactivated.description: Boolean field which show if option is deactivated.        Client can also specify the time when option is deactivated

deactivation_start_date.title: Start date
deactivation_start_date.description: Date since option is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

deactivation_end_date.title: End date
deactivation_end_date.description: Date till option is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

partner_modifiers.title: Partner modifiers
partner_modifiers.description:
Option's nested modifiers.
                Maximum nesting level = 3.

days_of_week.title: Days of week
days_of_week.description: List of days of the week (MONDAY, TUESDAY, WEDNESDAY, THURSDAY, FRIDAY, SATURDAY, SUNDAY)

start_time.title: Start time
start_time.description: Time after which item is available in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format in restaurant local timezone

end_time.title: End time
end_time.description: Time after which item is not available in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format in restaurant local timezone

partner_id.title: Partner availability id
partner_id.description: Partner availability id. Filled in manually

authorization_headers.description: Headers for authorization on your side which we will send with orders

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Necessary field, that can take such params as order_status, order_type, order_delivery_type
        Empty dict means that all filters will be suitable
        And list of supported values for example:
            "order_status": ["new", "accepted", "completed", "cancelled"]
            "order_type": ["pickup", "delivery", "dinein"]
            "order_delivery_type": ["restaurant"]

version.title: Webhook version
version.description: Payload which we are sending on your webhook depends on version.For Order events you can use `1` or `2`.For Other events you can use only `1`

name.title: Name
name.description: The display name of the menu item

is_deactivated.title: Is deactivated
is_deactivated.description:
Boolean field which show if item is deactivated.
            Client can also specify the time when item is deactivated

deactivation_start_date.title: Deactivation start date
deactivation_start_date.description: Date since item is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

deactivation_end_date.title: Deactivation end date
deactivation_end_date.description: Date till item is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

media_url.title: Media url
media_url.description:
The URL where the image file can be downloaded.
            The image you have selected will be transformed to fit provider requirements
            (we recommend to keep at least 1024 px each side). If provider expects specific aspect-ratio,
            white borders can be added to fit this requirement.

price.title: Price
price.description: The cost of this item. This field should be a positive number.

original_price.title: Original item price
original_price.description: The cost of the item for pickup. This price does not include delivery charges. This field should be a positive number.

prices_customization.title: Prices Customization
prices_customization.description: Custom price information for selected providers. Contains mapping of provider_id to prices. This field can be skipped, but cannot contain a null value.

min_amount.title: Min amount
min_amount.description: Default minimum quantity that can be ordered of this item. Default value - 1

max_amount.title: Max amount
max_amount.description: Default maximum quantity that can be ordered of this item. Default value - 3

partner_availability.title: Partner availability
partner_availability.description: Partner ID of availability, which is connected with this item (opening hours of the restaurant)

partner_modifiers.title: Partner modifiers
partner_modifiers.description:
All of the partner IDs for the menu modifiers that belongs to this item.
            Modifiers will be displayed in UI in the same order they are listed here.

tax_rate.title: Tax rate
tax_rate.description: Extra tax which may be added to some items on top of regular sales tax. Must be between 0 and 1.

tax_category.title: Tax category
tax_category.description: Tax category that an item belongs to (only for Canada). It's ignored if is_alcohol is True

is_alcohol.title: Is alcohol
is_alcohol.description: Flag indicates that item contain alcohol

pos_id.title: POS modifier id
pos_id.description: Modifier id from your POS system

partner_id.title: Partner modifier id
partner_id.description: Partner modifier id. Filled in manually

name.title: Name
name.description: The displayed name for the modifier or size

is_required.title: Is required
is_required.description: A boolean field that indicates that the modifier is required or not

min_options.title: Min options
min_options.description: Min number of options which customer select.

max_options.title: Max options
max_options.description: Max number of options which customer select.

default_options.title: Default options
default_options.description: The options ids, if any, that are selected by default for this modifier

partner_options.title: Partner options
partner_options.description:
All of the partner IDs for the menu options that belongs to this modifier.
            Options will be displayed in UI in the same order they are listed here.

type.title: Modifier type
type.description:
The type of modifier it can be size or variation.
        Min and max options will be ignored if modifier type is 'size'.

free_options_quantity.title: Free Options Quantity
free_options_quantity.description: Indicates how many options are free when this modifier is selected when this modifier is selected

min_options_quantity.title: Min Options Quantity
min_options_quantity.description: Indicates the minimum number of options quantity that must be selected when this modifier is selected

max_options_quantity.title: Max Options Quantity
max_options_quantity.description: Indicates the maximum number of options quantity that can be selected when this modifier is selected

pos_id.title: POS option id
pos_id.description: Option id from your POS system

partner_id.title: Partner option id
partner_id.description: Partner option id.

name.title: Name
name.description: The displayed name for the option or size

original_price.title: The cost of the item for pickup. This price does not include delivery charges. This field should be a positive number.

prices_customization.title: Prices Customization
prices_customization.description: Custom price information for selected providers. Contains mapping of provider_id to prices. This field can be skipped, but cannot contain a null value.

tax_rate.title: Tax rate
tax_rate.description: Extra tax which may be added to some options on top of regular sales tax.. Must be between 0 and 1.

tax_category.title: Tax category
tax_category.description: Tax category that an option belongs to (only for Canada)

is_deactivated.title: Is deactivated
is_deactivated.description: Boolean field which show if option is deactivated.        Client can also specify the time when option is deactivated

deactivation_start_date.title: Start date
deactivation_start_date.description: Date since option is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

deactivation_end_date.title: End date
deactivation_end_date.description: Date till option is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

partner_modifiers.title: Partner modifiers
partner_modifiers.description:
Option's nested modifiers.
                Maximum nesting level = 3.

partner_id.title: Partner availability id
partner_id.description: Partner availability id. Filled in manually

auto_accept_cooking_time.title: Auto Accept Cooking Time
auto_accept_cooking_time.description: Auto accept orders cooking time in minutes.

restaurant_delivery_time.title: Restaurant delivery time
restaurant_delivery_time.description: Restaurant self-delivery time in minutes. Default value: 30

auto_accept_delivery_enabled.title: Auto Accept Delivery Enabled
auto_accept_delivery_enabled.description: Auto accept delivery enabled indicates whether automatic order delivery confirmation is enabled.

partner_id.title: Partner menu id
partner_id.description: Id menu from the client

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the menu to be displayed

media_url.title: Media url
media_url.description: The URL where the image file can be downloaded.

partner_categories.title: Partner categories
partner_categories.description:
List of partner categories ids, which belongs to this menu.
            Categories will be displayed in UI in the same order they are listed here.

pos_id.title: POS category id
pos_id.description: Category id from your POS system

partner_id.title: Partner category id
partner_id.description: Partner category id. Filled in manually

title.title: Title
title.description: The displayed name for the category

is_deactivated.title: Is deactivated
is_deactivated.description: Boolean field which show if category is deactivated.        Client can also specify the time when category is deactivated

deactivation_start_date.title: Deactivation start date
deactivation_start_date.description: Date since category is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

deactivation_end_date.title: Deactivation end date
deactivation_end_date.description: Date till category is deactivated (format year-month-dayThour:minute:second.msecZ)

media_url.description: The URL where the image file can be downloaded.

partner_items.description:
All of the partner IDs for the menu items that belongs to this category.
            Items will be displayed in UI in the same order they are listed here.
